creator: michael.scheidell@secnap.com
text:
Id like to retract that patch.
clamdscan doesn't work on a and64 (intel xeon) anymore.

seems to work fine on i386.

it just hangs or gets errors.
I am trying to diagnose the problem now.

clamav might need to be marked broken for amd64.
